ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the game details */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., regular, playoff) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the game */,
  "winning_team" TEXT /* Team that won the game */,
  "quarter" INTEGER /* Current quarter in the game */,
  "sec_left" INTEGER /* Seconds left in the current quarter */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the game */,
  "game_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation for the team */,
  "team_city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "team_state" TEXT /* State where the team is based */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "player_position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "player_jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "player_height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "player_weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_rosters" (
  "game_roster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game roster */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_roster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plays" (
  "play_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each play */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game this play belongs to */,
  "away_team" TEXT /* Name of the away team */,
  "home_team" TEXT /* Name of the home team */,
  "away_play" TEXT /* Description of the play made by the away team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Current score of the away team */,
  "home_play" TEXT /* Description of the play made by the home team */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Current score of the home team */,
  "play_type" TEXT /* Type of play (e.g., shot, pass, rebound) */,
  "play_result" TEXT /* Result of the play (e.g., make, miss, turnover) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("play_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player action */,
  "play_id" INTEGER /* ID of the play this action belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., shot, pass, rebound) */,
  "action_result" TEXT /* Result of the action (e.g., make, miss, turnover) */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fouls" (
  "foul_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each foul */,
  "play_id" INTEGER /* ID of the play this foul belongs to */,
  "foul_type" TEXT /* Type of foul committed (e.g., personal, technical) */,
  "fouler_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player committing the foul */,
  "fouled_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player being fouled */,
  "rebounder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who rebounds */,
  "rebound_type" TEXT /* Type of rebound (e.g., defensive, offensive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("foul_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "timeouts" (
  "timeout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each timeout */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game this timeout is associated with */,
  "timeout_team" TEXT /* Team that called the timeout */,
  "free_throw_shooter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player taking the free throw after the timeout */,
  "free_throw_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the free throw (make or miss) */,
  "free_throw_num" INTEGER /* Number of free throws taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("timeout_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "turnovers" (
  "turnover_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each turnover */,
  "play_id" INTEGER /* ID of the play this turnover belongs to */,
  "turnover_player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who turned the ball over */,
  "turnover_type" TEXT /* Type of turnover (e.g., traveling, bad pass) */,
  "turnover_cause" TEXT /* Cause of the turnover */,
  "turnover_causer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who caused the turnover */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("turnover_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rebounding" (
  "rebound_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rebound */,
  "play_id" INTEGER /* ID of the play this rebound belongs to */,
  "rebounder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who rebounded the ball */,
  "rebound_type" TEXT /* Type of rebound (e.g., defensive, offensive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rebound_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assists" (
  "assist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assist */,
  "play_id" INTEGER /* ID of the play this assist belongs to */,
  "assister_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who made the assist */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who received the assist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assist_id")
)
